name: Machine-readability issue

title: "[Machine Readability] "

---

## Scope Check

- [ ] This issue affects machine readability, retrieval, summarization, schema clarity, glossary consistency, or reading order.
- [ ] This is not a conceptual expansion.
- [ ] This does not introduce personal identity traces.

## Affected File

File and section:

## Machine Failure Mode

How could an AI/Agent, crawler, RAG pipeline, or summarizer misread this?

## Suggested Minimal Repair

What low-risk wording, structure, schema, or glossary fix would reduce the failure mode?
